arguments.argument: findTargetX=point_distance(oPlayer1.x,0,x,0) findTargetY=point_distance(0,oPlayer1.y,0,y) if findTargetX<drawRangeX and findTargetY<drawRangeY { draw_sprite(sTimerPlatformStep,0,x,y-10+stepOffset) draw_sprite(sprite_index,0,x,y) draw_set_alpha(1) draw_set_font(fnt_Swap) draw_set_halign(fa_center) textDropShadow(floor(timeLeft/15),x+16,y,textCMain,textCBorder,4) }
